diffs.diff:
--- a/debug_load.py
+++ b/debug_load.py
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import torch

+from model import create_model

+

+ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/best.pt'

+ckpt = torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location='cpu')

+backbone = ckpt.get('args', {}).get('backbone', 'dinov2')

+print(f'Checkpoint backbone: {backbone}')

+

+model = create_model(backbone, num_classes=345, pretrained=False)

+print(f'Position embeddings shape: {model.backbone.embeddings.position_embeddings.shape}')

+

+state_dict = ckpt['model']

+new_state_dict = {k[7:] if k.startswith('module.') else k: v for k, v in state_dict.items()}

+model.load_state_dict(new_state_dict, strict=True)

+print('State dict loaded successfully.')

+

+x = torch.randn(2, 3, 224, 224)

+model.eval()

+with torch.no_grad():

+    out = model(x)

+print(f'Forward pass output shape: {out.shape}')

--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -10,7 +10,17 @@
         if pretrained:

             self.backbone = AutoModel.from_pretrained('facebook/dinov2-base')

         else:

-            config = Dinov2Config()

+            # DINOv2-base uses 518x518 images with patch size 14.

+            # Explicitly set this so pretrained=False matches pretrained=True shapes.

+            config = Dinov2Config(

+                image_size=518,

+                patch_size=14,

+                num_channels=3,

+                hidden_size=768,

+                num_hidden_layers=12,

+                num_attention_heads=12,

+                intermediate_size=3072,

+            )

             self.backbone = Dinov2Model(config)

         hidden_size = self.backbone.config.hidden_size

         self.head = nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_classes)
